name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.AnimPoseHelper.MuscleStiffness
summary: Muscle stiffness of masked joints. -values mean don't apply (just use defaults or ones applied by behaviors - safer if you are going to return to a behavior).
remarks:
Default value = -1.0f.
            Min value = -1.1f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
